div.h3: Receive Buffer · Send Buffer · EAGAIN Semantics

div.p: EAGAIN ≠ Error EAGAIN / EWOULDBLOCK means: "temporarily unavailable — try again later." In an event loop, "later" = after epoll signals the fd is ready again.

ul.li: read() EAGAIN → receive buffer empty → wait for EPOLLIN
write() EAGAIN → send buffer full → buffer data, wait for EPOLLOUT
